name: CNC Router Machine
description: Precision routing and shaping for decorative panels, carved details, and custom wood components.
capacity: Panel routing, carving, grooving, and profile cutting
functionality: Converts digital design files into accurate architectural wood components.

name: Edge Banding Machine
description: Applies clean, durable edges to panels for cabinets, wardrobes, and visible architectural joinery.
capacity: Straight panel edging for furniture and cabinetry
functionality: Bonds, trims, and finishes panel edges for a refined factory-grade result.

name: Panel Saw Machine
description: Supports accurate panel sizing for repeatable production, cleaner cuts, and material efficiency.
capacity: Sheet goods, MDF, plywood, and laminated panels
functionality: Delivers accurate linear cuts for structured production workflows.

name: Automatic Drilling Machine
description: Creates consistent cabinet system holes for hinges, shelves, rails, and hardware fittings.
capacity: System holes, hinge points, and hardware patterns
functionality: Improves repeatability for modular cabinetry and joinery assembly.

name: Sanding Machine
description: Prepares refined surfaces for veneer, laminate, paint, and premium finishing workflows.
capacity: Flat panels and prepared wood surfaces
functionality: Creates smooth, even surfaces before coating, veneer, or final finishing.

name: Paint & Finishing Equipment
description: Supports polished finishing standards for durable, elegant architectural woodwork.
capacity: Paint, coating, staining, and final surface treatments
functionality: Supports consistent finish quality across custom furniture and architectural elements.

name: Beam Saw Production Line
description: Cuts batches of panel materials with clean alignment for efficient manufacturing throughput.
functionality: Improves production speed while maintaining repeatable panel dimensions.

name: Hot Press Lamination Machine
description: Supports laminate, veneer, and surface bonding for durable decorative panel applications.
capacity: Veneer, laminate, and decorative surface bonding
functionality: Applies controlled pressure and heat for stable surface adhesion.

name: Dust Collection System
description: Maintains a cleaner workshop environment by extracting dust from cutting and sanding operations.
capacity: Saw dust, sanding dust, and airborne production residue
functionality: Supports cleaner operations, equipment care, and better finishing preparation.

name: Spray Booth System
description: Creates controlled finishing conditions for smooth coating application and premium surface quality.
capacity: Paint, lacquer, stain, and protective coatings
functionality: Helps manage overspray, airflow, and finish consistency.

name: Assembly & Clamping Station
description: Supports stable assembly of cabinets, doors, frames, and bespoke furniture components.
capacity: Cabinet carcasses, frames, and custom furniture units
functionality: Improves alignment and assembly quality before final inspection.

name: Detail Trimming Machine
description: Handles fine trimming and edge refinement for detailed carpentry and custom joinery work.
capacity: Edges, profiles, and small custom components
functionality: Refines detailed parts for a cleaner final presentation.
